zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine於1378年7月9日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar32歲，母親Janet Keith of Syntoun36歲。他於1400年12月20日與Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾結婚。他去世於1452年9月7日在英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾希頓享年74歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine于1378年7月9日出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar32岁，母亲Janet Keith of Syntoun36岁。他于1400年12月20日与Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾结婚。他去世于1452年9月7日在英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾希頓享年74岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine was born on 9 July 1378, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar, was 32 and his mother, Janet Keith of Syntoun, was 36. He married Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith on 20 December 1400, in Selkirkshire, Scotland. He died on 7 September 1452, in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine est né le 9 juillet 1378, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Janet Keith of Syntoun, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith le 20 décembre 1400, à Selkirkshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1452, à Synton, Selkirkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine am 9. Juli 1378 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar 32 und seine Mutter Janet Keith of Syntoun 36. Er hat am 20. Dezember 1400 in Selkirkshire, Scotland Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith geheiratet. Er starb am 7. September 1452 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Synton, Selkirkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine è nato il il 9 luglio 1378 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Janet Keith of Syntoun, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith il 20 dicembre 1400, nel Selkirkshire, Scotland. Morì il 7 settembre 1452, nel Synton, Selkirkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskineが1378年7月9日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Marは32歳，母Janet Keith of Syntounは36歳であった。1400年12月20日にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアでLady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keithと結婚した。彼は1452年9月7日にイギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアシントンで74歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine(이)가 1378년 7월 9일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Keith of Syntoun(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1400년 12월 20일 스컷랜드 셀커크실르에서 Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1452년 9월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 셀커크실르 시턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.9 July 1378–7 September 1452: 9 de julho de 1378–7 de setembro de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine nasceu em 9 de julho de 1378, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Janet Keith of Syntoun, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith em 20 de dezembro de 1400, em Selkirkshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1452, em Synton, Selkirkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine родился 9 июля 1378 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Keith of Syntoun, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith 20 декабря 1400 г. в местности селкиркшир, Шотландия. Он умер 7 сентября 1452 г. в местности синтон, селкиркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.9 July 1378–7 September 1452: 9 de julio de 1378–7 de septiembre de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine nació el 9 de julio de 1378, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Janet Keith of Syntoun, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady XC111 Janet Erskine-Keith el 20 de diciembre de 1400, en Selkirkshire, Scotland. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1452, en Synton, Selkirkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
